project_type: Agent Skills repository with Markdown-based skill definitions, workshop materials, and validation scripts
build_system: No build system - validation via Python script
test_framework: Python validation script at skills-workshop/scripts/quick_validate.py - checks YAML frontmatter for: name (kebab-case, max 64 chars), description (max 1024 chars, no angle brackets), allowed properties only (name, description, license, allowed-tools, metadata, compatibility)
test_command: for d in skills/skills/*/; do if [ -f "${d}SKILL.md" ]; then python3 skills-workshop/scripts/quick_validate.py "$d"; fi; done
verification_instructions: Run quick_validate.py against each new skill directory. Validate all pass.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No build system needed. Python 3 with pyyaml required for validation.
contribution_requirements: Kebab-case names, SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter, update CATALOG.md, validate with quick_validate.py before submitting. Do NOT modify existing Anthropic skills.
key_patterns: Skills follow YAML frontmatter (name, description, license, metadata) then markdown body with Instructions section. Existing skills use: Step-based numbered instructions, example user triggers, guidelines section. Progressive disclosure: frontmatter always loaded, body loaded on trigger, references loaded as needed. Keep under 500 lines.
directory_structure: Root has README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, QUICKSTART.md. skills/ contains the skills collection with skills/skills/ holding individual skill folders. Each skill folder has SKILL.md minimum. skills-workshop/ has training materials and validation scripts.
